ogTitle: Brunswick West vs Bruthen: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Brunswick West and Bruthen.
heading: Brunswick West vs Bruthen — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Brunswick West, Victoria and Bruthen, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Brunswick West has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Bruthen (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Brunswick West or Bruthen safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Brunswick West has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Bruthen scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Brunswick West scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Bruthen scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Brunswick West or Bruthen?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Brunswick West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
